author: Marcel Roozekrans
name: BlazorNative App
description: A Blazor app compiled with NativeAOT into a native Android shell: the .NET app (pages, manifest, the NativeAOT publish head) plus a runnable Android/Gradle shell tree.

modifiers.//: The wrapper jar is binary — never run it through the substitution engine.

symbols.//2: THREE symbols, and no more (8.3 design decision 6). The app name
symbols.//4: BlazorNative package version. NO minSdk symbol, deliberately:
symbols.//5: below 24 breaks the NDK/Coil assumptions and above 24 is the
symbols.//6: user's one-line edit — a symbol invites a value nothing tests.

BlazorNativeVersion.description: The BlazorNative package version the generated app references. The default MIRRORS src/Directory.Build.props and is pinned equal to it by TemplateDriftTests — it is not a second source of version truth.

applicationId.description: The Android applicationId AND the AGP namespace (R/BuildConfig package). Defaults to com.example.<appname, lowercased>. NOTE: this is NOT the shell's Kotlin package — that stays io.blazornative.shell by design, so the template's shell sources are byte-identical to the reference's.
